transcript_rule: Know the objective first, then use documentation for syntax and valid arguments.
Warnings are not errors; they can be hidden for screen space but should not be confused with failed code.
Use set_option for readable floats or more rows, then reset options so the kernel is not cluttered.
Hidden spaces in exchange column names cause KeyError; strip names before selecting.
Read dates as dates and set them as the index at load time when possible.
Financial data is time series; sort in chronological order before returns, rolling windows, or visual inspection.
loc uses labels and includes date endpoints; iloc uses integer positions and excludes the stop.
Add null/static/computed columns deliberately and avoid confusing temporary copies with assigned changes.
Plotly/cufflinks can create interactive candlesticks; static Matplotlib charts remain useful for offline packs.
Quantstats, pyfolio, backtrader, and legacy zipline are examples; choose maintained tools and understand outputs.
additive_example: Use libraries after the pandas basics are understood.
